audit_items.proof_trace: Only allocation is do_item_alloc at line 2306. On allocation failure, do_item_remove(it) cleans up the original item reference. On success, do_item_remove(new_it) at line 2317 releases the new item. All error paths before allocation call do_item_remove(it). The function guarantees every acquired item reference is released via do_item_remove, which frees slab memory when refcount reaches zero.
